'''paguju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:reaccretion|reaccretion]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-g-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:reaccretion|reaccretion]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| paguju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pægijith|pægijith]] || [[word:pægijij|pægijij]] || [[word:pægijish|pægijish]] || [[word:pægiji|pægiji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pagugujuth|pagugujuth]] || [[word:pagugujuj|pagugujuj]] || [[word:pagugujush|pagugujush]] || [[word:paguguju|paguguju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pagujuth|pagujuth]] || [[word:pagujuj|pagujuj]] || [[word:pagujush|pagujush]] || [[word:paguju|paguju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pagufjuth|pagufjuth]] || [[word:pagufjuj|pagufjuj]] || [[word:pagufjush|pagufjush]] || [[word:pagufjuf|pagufjuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pagujuthu|pagujuthu]] || [[word:pagujuju|pagujuju]] || [[word:pagujushu|pagujushu]] || [[word:pagujuku|pagujuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pagujuth|pagujuth]] || [[word:pagujuj|pagujuj]] || [[word:pagujush|pagujush]] || [[word:paguju|paguju]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pagujuthul|pagujuthul]] || [[word:pagujujul|pagujujul]] || [[word:pagujushul|pagujushul]] || [[word:pagujukul|pagujukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pagujuthuthu|pagujuthuthu]] || [[word:pagujujuju|pagujujuju]] || [[word:pagujushushu|pagujushushu]] || [[word:pagujuku|pagujuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pagujuthun|pagujuthun]] || [[word:pagujujun|pagujujun]] || [[word:pagujushun|pagujushun]] || [[word:pagujukun|pagujukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pagujuthuoro|pagujuthuoro]] || [[word:pagujujuoro|pagujujuoro]] || [[word:pagujushuoro|pagujushuoro]] || [[word:pagujukuoro|pagujukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
